_description: Apollo People Search API (POST https://api.apollo.io/api/v1/mixed_people/api_search) query parameter specification. Use this schema to map AutoSourcing.html form fields into a valid Apollo search payload.

person_titles.description: Job titles held by the people you want to find. A person is included if they match any ONE of the supplied titles. Also matches similar titles unless include_similar_titles is false.

include_similar_titles.description: When true (default), results include people with similar or related job titles. Set to false for strict exact-title matches.

q_keywords.description: A free-text keyword string used to filter results. Searches across name, title, company, and bio fields.

person_locations.description: Locations where people live. Accepts city names, US state names, or country names (full names preferred).

person_seniorities.description: Seniority level filter. Valid values: owner, founder, c_suite, partner, vp, head, director, manager, senior, entry, intern. Infer these from job titles when possible.

organization_names.description: Company or organization names. A person is included if their current employer matches any of these names.

q_organization_domains_list.description: Company domain names (e.g. 'google.com', 'amazon.com'). Use when company domains can be inferred from company names.

organization_industry_tag_ids.description: Industry tag identifiers. Use only when a clear industry can be inferred from keywords or titles.

person_past_organization_names.description: Past employer names. Only include if explicitly looking for alumni of specific companies.

item_fields.id: Apollo internal person ID — store as _apollo_id for download-profile calls
item_fields.last_name: Last name (may be obfuscated as last_name_obfuscated)
item_fields.last_name_obfuscated: Obfuscated last name — use as fallback when last_name absent
item_fields.title: Current job title
item_fields.linkedin_url: LinkedIn profile URL — use as the primary link
item_fields.organization.name: Current employer name

response_fields.total_entries: Estimated total number of matching profiles
